D5 Design L3 Apply Reference

The Seven Contrasts

Itten's whole system on one page — step through the seven contrasts and see each one's signature side by side

Itten organised colour design into seven contrasts: hue, light-dark, cold-warm, complementary, simultaneous, saturation, and extension (area proportion). A composition usually leans on one or two; the gallery shows all seven so you can compare their character at a glance.

Step the selector through the seven. The chosen contrast enlarges with its name and idea; the rest stay as thumbnails. The dedicated modules go deeper on hue, value, warm-cool, complementary, and simultaneous contrast.
